title: calamintha clinopodium var. repens
intro: Calamintha clinopodium var. repens, also known as creeping savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of creeping savory include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to support respiratory health. Creeping savory can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking its medicinal properties.
